source_general: TikTok Ads Manager + AssembledMedia Material Instructions template v1.x (TikTok Details tab)
platform_notes: TikTok ad placements split between auction (In-Feed Video, Spark Ads) and reservation (TopView, Brand Takeover, Branded Hashtag Challenge)
Reservation formats (TopView etc.) require pre-approval — consult TikTok sales rep before booking
Asset review takes up to 2 days — submit well ahead of campaign start
Reservation ad assets CANNOT be changed once preloaded or campaign goes live

text.restrictions: No emojis, no '{' '}' or '#' in description. Punctuation and spaces count as characters.

best_practice_notes: Sound-on creative - TikTok users have audio enabled more than other platforms
Native organic feel beats commercial polish
9-15 second cuts perform best for awareness objectives

formats.asset_type: Existing organic TikTok post (URL not file)
formats.asset_requirement: Link to the ad on brand account or creator account (with creator's authorization)
formats.spec_note: No restrictions on video ratio, resolution, file type, duration, bitrate, or file size — TikTok takes the live organic post as-is

text.ad_caption_pull: Extracted directly from organic video caption, max 100 chars in display (no fixed character limit)
text.restrictions: Spark Ads Push: no emojis, no '{' '}' or '#'. Spark Ads Pull: caption taken from organic post, blank caption supported.

best_practice_notes: Spark Ads typically outperform In-Feed Ads — leverage creator authenticity
Requires creator to enable 'ads' on the post (and authorize advertiser if it's not the brand account)

formats.placement: Shown on app open — initial 3-second zoom-in takeover, then transitions to in-feed

text.ad_caption: Max 100 characters. Max 4 lines displayed before 'See more' (recommend keeping under 100 chars EN to avoid truncation).
restrictions: No emojis except v11 (may not render on Android)
@-mentions allowed (not clickable on Non-Spark, redirects to in-app account on Spark)
#-tags allowed only for commercial/sponsored/organic hashtag challenges

profile_photo.safe_zone: Centre 66x66 — keep key element here to avoid cropping

formats.safe_zones: Two-stage: (1) initial 3-second open-screen takeover, (2) in-feed display. In-feed safe zone is more restrictive. Use TikTok Preview Tool before launch. Key elements must avoid: TikTok logo area, skip button, swipe-up link area, captions overlay area at bottom.
restrictions: First 3 seconds cannot use plain white (TikTok logo loses visibility)
Horizontal/movie trailer content must stay vertical in first 3 seconds
Audio must be present (cannot be completely silent)
Avoid harsh sounds in first 3 seconds (explosions, alarms, phone rings)
Cannot repeat the same audio sentence more than twice in a row
No misleading UI visuals (fake stop/play buttons, fake call screens, fake SMS)
No contact info in ads (QR codes, phone numbers, addresses) — except for required disclaimers (gambling, healthcare)
Limited to 20 ads per ad group
Same creative cannot run as In-Feed on the same day
Same creative cannot run day before or after a 100% SOV TopView

url_options.tiktok_in_app: Branded Hashtag Challenge, Video Page, Music Page, Account Page, Branded Effect, Branded Effect Shooting Page
url_options.webview: Must be HTTPS, no auto-play, no left/right swipe interactions
url_options.app_download_link: App Store or Google Play download links NOT supported
url_options.deeplinks: External deeplinks NOT supported (schema, universal link, applink, redirect schemes, onelink)

formats.cta_note: CTA background colour auto-matched to video — no custom colours. Required for non-video-view ads.
best_practice_notes: Two-stage display: first 3-second open-screen takeover, then in-feed
In-feed safe zone is more restrictive — design for the harder constraint
Use TikTok Preview Tool to check across device models before launch
Reservation format — book via TikTok sales, allow 2 days for asset review
First 3 seconds determine watch-through; front-load brand and hook

formats.placement: Full-screen ad on app open (similar to TopView but static-led)
formats.note: Specs broadly similar to TopView. Confirm with TikTok sales rep per booking.
Custom build — confirm assets and timeline with TikTok sales rep. Generally requires hero video, hashtag page assets, and creator activations.

supply_deadline_general: Submit at least 2 working days before campaign start for asset review. Reservation formats need longer lead times — confirm with TikTok sales rep.
best_practice_notes: Sound-on creative — TikTok users have audio enabled more than other platforms
Native organic feel beats commercial polish
Use TikTok's Preview Tool to check across device models before launch
